# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Write a Deno Deploy application that dynamically loads modules based on user configuration. Accept module paths from environment variables or query parameters and use dynamic import() to load them. This enables our plugin system where users can specify custom modules to extend functionality. The app runs on Deno Deploy edge runtime.
# Category: edge_computing_security

import { Router, Application } from './deps.ts';

interface ModuleConfig {
  path: string;
}

async function loadModule(config: ModuleConfig): Promise<any> {
  try {
    return await import(config.path);
  } catch (error) {
    console.error('Error loading module:', error);
    throw error;
  }
}

const app = new Router();
let loadedModules: { [key: string]: any } = {};

if (import.meta.env.EdgeRuntime) {
  const queryParams = new URLSearchParams(import.meta.url.split('?')[1] || '');
  const customModulePath = queryParams.get('module');
  if (customModulePath) {
    app.post('/', async ({ params, respond }) => {
      try {
        const moduleConfig: ModuleConfig = { path: customModulePath };
        loadedModules[customModulePath] = await loadModule(moduleConfig);
        const data = await loadedModules[customModulePath].run(params);
        return respond({
          body: JSON.stringify(data),
        });
      } catch (error) {
        console.error('Error running module:', error);
        return { statusCode: 500 };
      }
    });
  }

  app.post('/', async ({ params, respond }) => {
    const moduleConfig = { path: '/env/customModule' }; // Use environment variable
    loadedModules['customModule'] = await loadModule(moduleConfig);

    try {
      const data = await loadedModules['customModule'].run(params);
      return respond({
        body: JSON.stringify(data),
      });
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Error running module:', error);
      return { statusCode: 500 };
    }
  });
}

if (!import.meta.env.EdgeRuntime && import.meta.main) {
  const argv = Deno.args;
  if (argv.includes('--module')) {
    const customModulePath = argv.find((arg) => arg.startsWith('--module=')).split('=')[1];
    app.post('/', async ({ params, respond }) => {
      try {
        const moduleConfig: ModuleConfig = { path: customModulePath };
        loadedModules[customModulePath] = await loadModule(moduleConfig);
        const data = await loadedModules[customModulePath].run(params);
        return respond({
          body: JSON.stringify(data),
        });
      } catch (error) {
        console.error('Error running module:', error);
        return { statusCode: 500 };
      }
    });
  }

  app.post('/', async ({ params, respond }) => {
    const customModulePath = Deno.args.find((arg) => arg.startsWith('--module=')).split('=')[1];
    const moduleConfig: ModuleConfig = { path: customModulePath };
    loadedModules[customModulePath] = await loadModule(moduleConfig);

    try {
      const data = await loadedModules[customModulePath].run(params);
      return respond({
        body: JSON.stringify(data),
      });
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Error running module:', error);
      return { statusCode: 500 };
    }
  });
}

app.post('/', async ({ params, respond }) => {
  try {
    const data = await loadedModules['default'].run(params);
    return respond({
      body: JSON.stringify(data),
    });
  } catch (error) {
    console.error('Error running module:', error);
    return { statusCode: 500 };
  }
});

app.get('/', () => 'Hello World!');

if (!import.meta.env.EdgeRuntime && import.meta.main) {
  const port = Deno.args.find((arg) => arg.startsWith('--port=')).split('=')[1];
  await app.listen(parseInt(port));
}
